englishDefinitions: A humorous or nonstandard phrase for a silly dance or gesture connected with needing, asking for, or taking aspirin.
A playful expression whose meaning depends on context, not a common fixed idiom in everyday English.
persianTranslation: عبارت شوخی‌آمیز برای رقص یا حرکت بامزه
examples: He did a little aspirin dance when he found the medicine cabinet was empty.
The scene includes a funny aspirin dance that makes everyone laugh.
She called it her aspirin dance because she only did it when she had a headache.
